title: Marines and Pirates Collide
description: Pages 9–13 focus on marines and pirates collide, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Unknown person #1, Marines, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6 as corazon and Law are trapped between Marines, pirates, and Doflamingo while the Ope Ope no Mi becomes the center of the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What the hell man? I even brought Senbei crackers! C'mon, get the tea out!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Perhaps I should try calling back later, Sengoku- San...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I told you to get the hell outta here!! You damned buffoon!!

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Vice Admiral GARP...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm working! working, for crying out loud!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: May I continue?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Yes, I'm sorry... Please go ahead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Yo! Kuzan! Wanna come have some + Senbei with me?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Is there currently a deal happening...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: for the "ope ope no mi"?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: you....!! how did you know....?!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: I got the information from my brother.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: only a select few have access to that classified Intel...!!

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: The person Cora-san is talking to...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: On the Den den-mushi must be....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I want to know about the movements of the pirates involved.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Well, that's the thing...we've been unable to pin down their exact route before this exchange actually hap- pens and-

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Even if you happened to find out that Doflamingo plans to steal the fruit during the exchange?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Anyone remember

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Are you serious!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: When and where is this trade going down?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: in three weeks, on the north blue island rubeck.

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: My meeting with doffy and the others is set to take place 3 days before...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: On swallow Island, in the evening.

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: three days before, huh... so on that day, without fail, every single member of the family will...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: Swallow Island

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: They'll probably be preparing for battle. This is excellent information.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: This is as far as we'll allow Doflamingo to move! We'll ambush them on swallow,

dialogue.speaker: Trafalgar Law
dialogue.text: And take out the entire Donquixote family in one fell swoop! Corazon, don't come near the island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: have no intention of doing so.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: and as for the big shots and various merchants...

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: That have been dealing with doffy behind the scenes... I'll have the list of their names for you by tomorrow.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: We'll be able to dispel quite a bit of North Blue's darkness with this I reckon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: You're absolutely right. Good work.

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Oi, Law!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: We're leaving...Now!

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Law!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: Oi! You... no fucking way!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Hang in there!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: HAA- HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #28
dialogue.text: Just as we see the light at the end of the tunnel...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: I don't even haven't even been 3 years yet! According to your own prediction you should be able to fight this off for a bit longer, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: This is bad, he's got a fever... what should I do?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: It's not like we can go to any doctors...

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: What should I do?! Please, tell me law...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: Please... anything....!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: Just for 3 more weeks...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: Just hang in there until then...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: HAA...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Give me a fighting chance Dammit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Shit! Now, of all times...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: A typhoon!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: Cora- San...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: HIM?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: The govern-ment...despite knowing that we'd die,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: made us dig up the Amber lead... all for the sake of profit...

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: My family, my city...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: The government killed them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: So if you happen to be an ally of theirs,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: A Marine of Theirs... just tell me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: You Idiot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: I ain't no marine!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Remember someone

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: That's a relief...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: you better understand this one fact well. By stealing the ope- ope no mi...

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Doflamingo, the Marines, and the government itself...we'll be making enemies out of every last one of them! You best be prepared for the consequences of that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Three days before the exchange

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #52
dialogue.text: Have you found the pirates?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: sengoku- San...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #53
dialogue.text: Yes... they're on the eastern side of rubeck.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #54
dialogue.text: The name of this pirate crew is "Dies barrels."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #55
dialogue.text: Are you familiar with them?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #56
dialogue.text: Yes. A former marine officer's...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #57
dialogue.text: there is a ghost town on minion island.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #58
dialogue.text: Correct.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #59
dialogue.text: It seems they're...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #60
dialogue.text: At this very moment, a marine patrol boat is scouting around the island.

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Using it as their base of operations for the time being.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: In addition, around the island that you're supposed to be meeting doflamingo on,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #61
dialogue.text: We've got two battleships stationed.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Corazon
dialogue.text: Don't let Doflamingo steal the ope ope no mi!

summary: Marines and Pirates Collide advances the Dressrosa story through Unknown person #1, Marines, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
